headline: Honeywell, Nigeria's Dangote Team Up To Increase Fuel Production, Improve Operations
summary: Honeywell partners with Dangote refinery to boost fuel output, improve efficiency and support expansion as earnings approach.

raw.headline: Honeywell, Nigeria's Dangote Team Up To Increase Fuel Production, Improve Operations
raw.summary: Honeywell partners with Dangote refinery to boost fuel output, improve efficiency and support expansion as earnings approach.

headline: HONEYWELL TO HELP BOOST FUEL PRODUCTION AND ENHANCE WORKFORCE CAPABILITIES AT DANGOTE REFINERY
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced it is providing connected services, advanced digital performance monitoring and operator training to the Dangote Petroleum Refinery in Lekki, Nigeria — the world's largest single-train petroleum refinery.

headline: Honeywell To Deploy Connected Solutions At Dangote Refinery To Boost Fuel Production And Enhance Workforce Capabilities In Nigeria
